examples.title: Finite Field Multiplication
examples.description: Implements GF(2⁸) multiplication using polynomial reduction
examples.code:
FUNCTION ff_mult(a, b, mod_poly):
    product = 0
    WHILE b > 0:
        IF b is odd:
            product = product XOR a
        a = a << 1
        IF a & 0x100:
            a = a XOR mod_poly
        b = b >> 1
    RETURN product
examples.explanation: Performs multiplication in GF(2⁸) using bitwise operations and modular reduction
